Create a vertical 9:16 anime sports character card for HomeRun, matching the reference player avatar facial identity and the HomeRun hero art direction: cinematic Japanese sports anime, deep navy night baseball stadium, warm golden stadium lights, painterly brush texture, premium but grounded sports-tech mood. Keep the character as a Chinese amateur baseball player, no real team logos, no MLB marks, no readable text. Leave clean negative space in the lower third for later Chinese typography overlay. Use sharp expressive linework and dramatic rim lighting.

Subject: 林澈 (Lin Che), jersey #7, 二刀流队长, primary position CF/P. Character personality: 他能从中外野追上飞球，也能在最后一局走上投手丘。 Story cue: 林澈是北洲航海家的 7 号队长，平时守中外野，关键局面也能登板救援。过去他靠直觉跑垒和投球，常常知道自己很拼，却说不清哪一步真的改变了比赛。用了 HomeRun 的比赛回放、投球数记录和 AI 动作分析后，他开始把每一次启动、挥棒和释放点都当成能复盘的选择。 Pose and props: show a confident half-body baseball pose that fits two-way captain pose: baseball bat or batting gloves visible, outfielder glove ready, and a subtle pitching-motion echo or mound silhouette behind him; use Beizhou Voyager team colors (深海蓝, 球场白, 金色灯光) as subtle uniform accents. HomeRun product cue: imply AI 投球动作分析、跑垒贡献、投球数管理与赛后球员卡分享。 through subtle UI-like light trails, data lines, scoreboard glow, or motion-analysis nodes in the background, without placing readable interface text. Card copy to reserve room for later overlay: 二刀流队长 / 速度 / 投球数 / 关键救援 / 攻守之间，每一次选择都应该被看见。.
